name: Till Brönner
abstract: Till Brönner (German: [tɪl ˈbʁœnɐ] ; born 6 May 1971 in Viersen, West Germany) is a German jazz trumpeter, flügelhorn player, singer, composer, producer and photographer.

concerts.label: The 12 Cellists of the Berliner Philharmoniker

works.t: Nobody Knows the Trouble I've Seen

concerts.label: Thomas Quasthoff, Bass-Baritone: An American Songbook
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Janis Siegel
about_quotes.evidence: Till Bronner is a German trumpet player whose music I really like.
about_quotes.doc_title: Janis Siegel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 22, 2015
